_comment: FINAL release list = 3 items. The following were REMOVED from the old repo releases.json during design: 'Celestial Electronics vol.1 Rozselini', 'Telepresence', 'Krama Installation 2021', 'Anisotropy'. Display order is newest-first as below. Each renders with a BUY link (bandcamp_link).

releases.title: Diataxis
releases.label: JUNE Records
releases.description: Formalizes “Αναπαράσταση Δυνάμεων” (Representation of Forces, 1990), a painting by Anastasios Savvaidis, in the language of optical networks, where information moves as light. Its forces are taken as dimensions and dispersed as encoded signals, each carrying a fragment of the image. At the receiving point they are reassembled into a single whole, the Diataxis. Every piece is paired with a text of its own, written in Greek between engineering and lyricism, on a single principle of light transmission. The texts are published with the record, pressed on 12″ vinyl with an A3 poster of the painting.

releases.title: DEC/PDC
releases.label: JUNE Records
releases.description: Distributed computation leaves the one machine and spreads across many, with no center to hold it and no conductor to keep time. Two pieces, recorded live, their layered fragments merging and dissipating like processes across a network. A limited edition on transparent lathe-cut 7″ vinyl.

releases.title: NSA Trusted Networks
releases.label: Lower Parts
releases.description: The debut EP carries the vision of the early computing era, of freedom and the making of new realities. Four pieces move through the network and its data, a passage that feels trusted. Live-recorded with ’90s Yamaha synthesizers, pressed on 12″ vinyl with an A3 poster by Layer Based Human Activities.
